Frostreaver's Velium Crown  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: HEAD
AC: 30
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +20 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Truesight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Frostreaver's Velium Crown
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: HEAD
AC: 30
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +20 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Truesight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Crown of the Coldain Kings
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Cloth
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Light:Greater Lightstone
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:11:01
Page Updated:Sun Dec 19th, 2010

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Icewell Keep
NPC Name
Dain Frostreaver IV

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Icewell Keep
Quest Name
Custom Plate Helms - Thurgadin

Kael Drakkel
Quest Name
Custom Plate Helms - Kael Drakkel

Skyshrine
Quest Name
Custom Plate Helms - Skyshrine

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Icewell Keep


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

An Excellent item. =)

And Dain said let there be LIGHT!!
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2003 at 2:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362311300
58 posts
just got this today, and after 55 levels of seeing in human vision, the Vision improvements alone are worth the raid points i spent on it, however, the 30 ac, 20 mr, 5 to all other resists, and Customisable is NICE. Now all i gotta do is figure out how to Customise it )

Slaton Dragoonbane
55 Knight of Mith Marr
Proud Member of Regret
Nameless server

9 posts
Rogue speant 10pts today on brell so it wouldn't rot.There is a armorer right near where the king spawns who will customize for you if faction is not dstroyed.

QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2002 at 2:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361737014
226 posts
This won't go to the most greedy player cause the most greedy player won't want it. People kill dain for the belt not the helm, this helm is crap, it doesn't have hp or sta, it will most likely goto some lucky newbie or alt. No one really wants to waste their points on something like this.
▲ Page top
Idiots
QuoteReply
# May 28 2002 at 10:27 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591762242785
18 posts
Now I remember why I detest coming here.... Lets make something very clear;

If you are capable of getting this item, you are already in a guild that has a point system. You dont all just /ran 1000 to see who gets it. Its either a point system or reward, and usually the former. Put down the stupid debates, thats how it works.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 22 2002 at 12:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Could you imagine what would happen if they were desciding on who wins roll and then someone walked up and looted it?
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 19 2002 at 8:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) God I want this helm, ultra and see invis forever, sick ac, nice resists.
New gtraphic

# Aug 21 2001 at 11:02 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591755553130
12 posts
this is one of the crowns VI added to the *quest* to turn them in and get the new graphics.

# Jan 30 2002 at 8:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765847552
70 posts
where is the quest to do this and is the quest only for Plate classes? or could I turn in an Arch mage's crown and be cat dude? thx
▲ Page top
RE: New gtraphic
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2002 at 6:00 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761991555
Scholar
300 posts
Don't hold me to this, but if you go into Skyshrine up to the large room with the armor-quest wyverns (on the way to Yelinak), you'll see a large wyvern just as you enter. He's 58+ (RTM at 56). If you go up to him and work the conversation, he'll give you a list of helms you can hand to him. I believe I remember the Frostreaver's crown among them. I'd imagine if your faction is good enough to do the SS armor quests that you could receive the custom graphics (I'm max ally, so I can't say for sure how high it has to be).
▲ Page top
RE: rangers
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 12:21 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591764386908
6 posts
Sorry for the interruption here but uh... No, you don't know a whole heckuva lot about Monks.
"monks have a TON of all/all low weight high ac items in velious." My friend, what are you smoking and where can I aquire some? I WISH we had a wide selection of low weight high AC items. But we don't. They're a very, very vast minority when it comes to items. Many of these items are only available to the elite as well for that matter. I'm a 55 Monk, I'm not in Afterlife or Forsaken Realm (the two uberest guilds on the Mithaniel Marr server for those of you who don't know) and these are the guilds that get loot like that. It's not something you see every Monk and his little brother Jimmy sporting around Freeport.
So don't dare say that a Ranger is more deserving than a Monk or Rogue for this item. It just plain isn't so. Look at your upscale AC items and look at ours. The AC just isn't there. Same for Rogues, bless their black little thieving hearts. I'd venture to say you should be allowed to roll, as should everyone that would genuinely use this crown. But you take no priority as a Ranger.
/em waggles finger profusely
▲ Page top
RE: rangers
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2002 at 10:17 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591773916956
View User Forum
Sage
164 posts
Boy, Anti, you sure have come long way since this post. :)

Good to see you got yourself some of those high AC fancy items that you always wanted. Dark Bane too... my how you grew!

Hugs to the craziest monk on Mith Marr.

#Anonymous, Posted: May 03 2001 at 2:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Oh come on please, lets not get stupid here. This crown rules, and is awesome for just about anyone. #REDACTED, Posted: Jun 11 2001 at 8:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think it's better for gnome clerics =)
#Anonymous, Posted: May 02 2001 at 7:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Enchanter item thx drive thru

#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 08 2001 at 5:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 08 2001 at 5:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You can ***** the helm, I'd personally like to have one, Even if the Effect was True North...I'll take 30 ac and 20 magic resistance anyday.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 29 2001 at 8:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You are thinking of True North, not True Sight.

got helm today and truesight is ultravision + see invis

its nice to finally be able to see!

What True sight does is it makes you Always face True north. the duaration is 45 minutes. its really usfull for walking in a strait line north.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 5:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Wizards have a spell called PLAINSIGHT that fits what you are talking about, but never heard it called TRUESIGHT.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 12:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 1:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Im looking at the +30 ac. Nice. Of course you must be a super elitist, in a big "Uber" guild to even think about owning it, so for us mere humans it is a pipe dream
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 3:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I can see the fights now Warriors saying thay should get it due to AC and SV Magic and casters wanting it for the SV magic
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 1:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why would a caster need sv magic more than a warrior?
RE: Truesight?
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2001 at 8:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750174660
Sage
52 posts
Why would a caster want/need a high MR? Due to the fact that a spell that would take 1/3 to 1/2 life from a warrior will kill a caster. Resist gear isn't class specific, we all want to resist/partial resist those big nasties. But yes, I could see everyone rolling for this... =)
▲ Page top
RE: Truesight?
